scenario: Iris Healthcare operates 7 Self-Managed Camunda 8.8 environments and wants developers to explore the Operate API interactively against a local cluster without configuring an external tool. The platform team must direct them to the Swagger UI URL that a running Self-Managed Operate instance serves on the default port so the 240 users can sanity-check requests.
question: Which URL serves the Operate API Swagger UI on a Self-Managed Camunda 8.8 Operate instance using default settings?

options.text: The Swagger UI is served at http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui.html on a Self-Managed Operate instance running with default ports for direct exploration of the Operate API endpoints
The Swagger UI is served at http://localhost:9600/actuator/swagger on a Self-Managed Operate instance using the broker monitoring port for the Operate API endpoints
The Swagger UI is served at https://operate.camunda.io/swagger-ui.html on a Self-Managed Operate instance proxied through the public Camunda 8 SaaS gateway for the Operate API
The Swagger UI is served at http://localhost:8080/api-docs/index.html on a Self-Managed Operate instance through the API Explorer bridge bundled with Operate for the Operate API

a.text: Correct. The Operate API overview documents that a running Self-Managed Operate instance exposes the Swagger UI at http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui.html on the default port, alongside the SaaS form under https://${REGION}.operate.camunda.io/${CLUSTER_ID}/swagger-ui.html.

b.text: Incorrect. Port 9600 hosts broker monitoring and actuator endpoints, not the Operate Swagger UI; the documented Self-Managed Operate path is /swagger-ui.html on port 8080.

c.text: Incorrect. https://operate.camunda.io/swagger-ui.html is not the documented Self-Managed endpoint; Self-Managed Operate serves the Swagger UI at http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui.html on the local instance.

d.text: Incorrect. There is no /api-docs/index.html path documented for the Operate Swagger UI; the documented Self-Managed location is /swagger-ui.html on port 8080 of the running Operate instance.

explanation: The Operate API overview lists the Swagger UI served inside a running Operate instance at /swagger-ui.html. For Self-Managed installations the documented URL is http://localhost:8080/swagger-ui.html, while SaaS uses https://${REGION}.operate.camunda.io/${CLUSTER_ID}/swagger-ui.html.
